nasb.text: Abimelech then took sheep and oxen and male and female servants, and gave them to Abraham, and restored his wife Sarah to him.

esv.text: Then Abimelech took sheep and oxen, and male servants and female servants, and gave them to Abraham, and returned Sarah his wife to him.

cnv.text: 亞比米勒取了些牛羊、僕婢，送給亞伯拉罕，又把亞伯拉罕的妻子撒拉還給他。

ccb.text: 于是，亚比米勒带来牛、羊和男女仆婢送给亚伯拉罕，并把他妻子撒拉还给他，

csbs.text: 亚比米勒带来了羊群和牛群、男仆和婢女，送给亚伯拉罕，又把亚伯拉罕的妻子撒拉归还给他。
